module.name: columns
module.description: Lays the body out in evenly sized side-by-side columns, one column per body section, wrapping to a single column on narrow screens.
module.aiSpec:
Lay content out in evenly sized side-by-side columns. Block module: split the body into columns with `<!-- @ -->` — one section per column. Each section is ordinary Markdown (text, lists, images, even other modules). Columns wrap to one column on narrow screens. If `count` is omitted the number of non-empty sections is used. This is a plain even-width layout; for a labelled two-panel A-vs-B contrast use @compare.
Parameters: • count (number 1..6, default = number of sections) — how many equal columns. • gap (CSS length, default 1.5rem) — horizontal space between columns. • valign (select: top | center | stretch, default stretch) — vertical alignment of columns relative to the tallest one. • align (select: left | center | right, default left) — text alignment inside columns. • divider (boolean, default false) — draw a thin rule between adjacent columns.
Example: <!-- @columns count: 2, gap: 2rem, divider: true --> Left column content. <!-- @ --> Right column content. <!-- @end -->

param.name: count
param.label: Columns
param.desc: Number of equal columns (defaults to the section count)

param.name: valign
param.label: Vertical align
param.desc: Vertical alignment of columns relative to the tallest

param.name: divider
param.label: Divider
param.desc: Draw a thin rule between adjacent columns

snippet.label: Even Columns
snippet.text: <!-- @columns count: 2 --> Left column content. <!-- @ --> Right column content. <!-- @end -->
